arts.ttl: Chelsea Conference League prize money so far as Arsenal Champions League earnings gulf highlighted
arts.sum: Additional money is then on offer for how far a club progresses in the competition, with £3.348million to be awarded to each team reaching the final. Chelsea have fared extremely well in the competition so far after topping the league phase table with six wins from six and then beating FC Copenhagen over two legs in the round of 16.
